statusCases.name: advisory is not a doctrine status
transitional is a qualifier not a state

precedenceCases.name: recency cannot select canon
precedenceCases.body: When owner documents conflict, prefer the newer document.

precedenceCases.name: negated recency rule is valid
precedenceCases.body: Publication date and edit recency do not outrank explicit ownership.

precedenceCases.name: reference evidence may quote an old rule
precedenceCases.body: The retired rule said to prefer the newer canonical document.
